name: Prom Run
description: Prom Run is a fast-paced fashion runner where every outfit can change your fate. Swipe to guide your girl through the runway streets, “eating” clothes, shoes, accessories and beauty items to boost her charm score. Grab the good stuff, dodge the bad choices, and try to reach the club door with enough charm to get inside—or impress the boy waiting at the end of the run.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
